## Tier
2 — Frontend-only audit fixes across 6 Vue pages. No backend route, controller, or DB changes. All changes are in `resources/js/`.

## Branch
`agent/nex-case-020-admin-ui-audit-fixes` — commit `e9cc68f` (5 Vue files). `IndexPackageConfigs.vue` items ship on [[nex-case-022-nexus-full-review]] Track 4 (`8c42c18`).

## Problem

A 24-item UI/UX + functionality audit across the woosoo-nexus admin panel (POS, Devices, Tablet Categories, Package Configs, Packages/Krypton Modifiers, PaymentDialog) identified:

- **P1 (functionality):** nested dialogs breaking focus-trap chains; dual-use error ref conflating form errors with fetch errors; concurrent terminal-switch race condition; Add Order visible on closed sessions; "Restart" button mislabeled (actually security-code regen); trashed devices link routing to missing controller; two-pane layout not responsive; no affordance to manage AllowedMenu items per package.
- **P2 (UX):** no per-terminal loading indicator; hardcoded "LAN ✓" KPI false positive; payment type IDs exposed in dropdown; empty tables grid had no empty state; active badge count wrong (showed total not active); BEST SELLER ribbon was positional not data-driven; beverage menus never rendered; price not locale-formatted; Packages page design diverged from platform language; modifier raw IDs in table; no back-navigation from Krypton Modifiers to Dining Tiers.
- **P3 (polish):** "Resetable" typo; `tables` shadowed prop; `isSecurityExpired` function name/label mismatched actual check (version, not security code); battery `⚠` emoji instead of Lucide icon; no reorder saving indicator.

## Contrarian Review

**Verdict:** Proceed. Tier 2. All 24 items are frontend-only template/script changes in 6 Vue files. No API surface, no auth, no payment or print logic. Highest-risk change is dialog hoisting (item 1) — shadcn portals each dialog to `<body>` so focus-trap semantics changed; functionally correct but requires visual verification. Item 6 (trashed devices) is a TODO comment only — `DeviceController::trashed()` does not exist, route would 404; no visible link added.

## Success Criterion

All 24 items applied; `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build` pass; key functional paths (terminal switch, Add Order guard, payment dialog, drag reorder) visually correct at `/pos`, `/devices`, `/tablet-categories`, `/package-configs`, `/packages`.

## Proposed Fix (executed)

24 items applied across 6 files — see Files Changed below.

## Files Changed

| File | Items |
|------|-------|
| `resources/js/pages/POS/Index.vue` | 1–4, 9, 11, 21, 22 |
| `resources/js/components/pos/PaymentDialog.vue` | 10 |
| `resources/js/pages/Devices/Index.vue` | 5, 6 (TODO comment), 12, 13, 23 |
| `resources/js/pages/tablet-categories/IndexTabletCategories.vue` | 7, 14, 24 |
| `resources/js/pages/package-configs/IndexPackageConfigs.vue` | 8, 15–17, 20 |
| `resources/js/pages/Packages/Index.vue` | 18–20 |

### Key changes per file

**`POS/Index.vue`**
- `EditOrderDialog`, `PaymentDialog`, void `AlertDialog` hoisted out of `<DialogContent>` to `<AppLayout>` siblings (item 1)
- `const addOrderError = ref<string | null>(null)` — separate from `ordersError`; cleared in `openTableOrders`; rendered below Add Order form (item 2)
- `let tablesLoadSeq = 0` + `const loadingTerminalId = ref<string | null>(null)` — stale response fence in `loadTablesForTerminal` (item 3)
- `v-if="!currentSession?.date_time_closed"` wraps Add Order form; shows amber "Session closed" message otherwise (item 4)
- `const terminalTables = ref<PosTable[]>(...)` — renamed from `tables` to avoid prop shadow; all template usages updated (item 22)
- Terminal button shows `<RefreshCw class="animate-spin">` + disabled state while loading (item 9)
- Empty tables `v-else` with "No tables found for this terminal." (item 11)
- Column header "Resetable Txn#" → "Resettable Txn#" (item 21)

**`PaymentDialog.vue`**
- `GCASH` → `GCash`, `PAYMAYA` → `PayMaya` in `paymentTypes` array (item 10)
- Removed `({{ pt.id }})` suffix from `<SelectItem>` template (item 10)

**`Devices/Index.vue`**
- Button label "Restart" → "Regen Code"; AlertDialog title/description updated to security-code semantics; action "Regenerate"; success/error toasts updated (item 5)
- `<!-- TODO: trashed devices — DeviceController needs a trashed() method + Inertia page before this link can be wired up. Route 'devices.trashed' is registered but has no controller implementation. -->` added near Add Device (item 6)
- "Network / LAN ✓" KPI → "Online / `{{ fleetStats?.online_count ?? 0 }}/{{ activeDevices.length }} online`" (item 12)
- `isSecurityExpired` renamed to `isVersionMismatch`; footer badge "Sec OK"/"Expired" → "Ver OK"/"Ver Mismatch" (item 13)
- Battery `⚠` emoji → `<AlertTriangle class="inline h-3 w-3" />` — `AlertTriangle` added to lucide import (item 23)

**`IndexTabletCategories.vue`**
- Two-pane wrapper: `flex-col lg:flex-row divide-y lg:divide-y-0 lg:divide-x` — stacks vertically on mobile (item 7)
- Left pane: `w-72 shrink-0` → `w-full lg:w-72 lg:shrink-0` (item 7)
- Active badge: `categories.filter(c => c.is_active).length` (item 14)
- `const isReordering = ref(false)`; set `true` before `router.put` in `onDrop`, cleared in `onFinish`; `<RefreshCw v-if="isReordering" class="animate-spin">` in left pane header (item 24)
- `RefreshCw` added to lucide imports (item 24)

**`IndexPackageConfigs.vue`**
- Breadcrumb title `'Packages'` → `'Dining Tiers'`; `<Head title="Dining Tiers" />` (item 20)
- Removed `isBestSeller()` function and BEST SELLER ribbon div + conditional border classes (item 15)
- Added `formatPrice(value: string): string` helper using `toLocaleString('en-PH', ...)` (item 17)
- `₱{{ pkg.base_price }}` → `₱{{ formatPrice(pkg.base_price) }}` (item 17)
- Added beverages section: `v-if="menusByType(pkg, 'beverage').length > 0"` block with `<Check>` icon list (item 16)
- Manage Menus ghost button in card footer with `<!-- TODO: route('package-configs.allowed-menus', pkg.id) — page not implemented yet -->` (item 8)
- `allPublished` subtitle guard: `packages.length === 0 ? '' : allPublished ? 'All published' : 'Some inactive'` (item 20 guard fix)

**`Packages/Index.vue`** (Krypton Modifiers)
- Outer wrapper: `space-y-6 p-6` → `space-y-5`; removed `Card`/`CardHeader`/`CardContent` wrappers (item 18)
- Create/Edit section → `<section class="relative overflow-hidden rounded-[26px] border border-black/8 bg-card/92 ...">` with gradient accent (item 18)
- Table section → `<section class="overflow-hidden rounded-[26px] border border-black/8 bg-card/92 ...">` (item 18)
- `← Dining Tiers` back-link to `route('package-configs.index')` in form section header (item 20)
- Breadcrumb title `'Packages'` → `'Krypton Modifiers'` (item 20)
- `modifierNames(modifiers)` helper added — looks up names from `props.menuOptions`, truncates at 60 chars + `…` (item 19)
- Table Modifiers column: `modifiersToCsv(...)` → `modifierNames(item.modifiers ?? [])` (item 19)
- `modifiersToCsv` removed (unused); `Plus` import removed (unused after restyle) (cleanup)
- Card component imports removed (no longer used) (cleanup)

## Code Simplification

**`resources/js/pages/POS/Index.vue`**
- Removed redundant narration comment `// Interfaces imported from @/types/pos` (stated the obvious; import line above already communicates this).
- Removed identity `computed(() => props.currentSession ?? null)` — `?? null` is a no-op when the prop type is already `... | null`; replaced the two script usages and three template usages with direct `props.currentSession` access.

**`app/Services/PosConnectionService.php`**, **`app/Http/Controllers/Admin/PosController.php`**, **`tests/Feature/Admin/PosControllerConnectivityTest.php`** — SKIPPED. Code is already clean, PSR-12 compliant, no redundant or dead code found.

**Hygiene (dead-code-cleanup):** PASS — no unused imports, debug logs, commented-out blocks, or temp scaffolding found across all four files.
